1.name: Gate

701.name: Pure
701.descriptionEn: Clean digital delay with clear, uncolored repeats.

702.name: Slap
702.descriptionEn: Short slapback echo for vintage bounce.

703.name: Warm
703.descriptionEn: Warm analog-voiced delay with darkening repeats.

705.name: Tube
705.descriptionEn: Tube tape-echo emulation with saturated repeats.

706.name: Reverse
706.descriptionEn: Reverse delay for backwards, swelling trails.

707.name: Analog
707.descriptionEn: Reproduces the sound of a vintage 1980's rack-mount delay machine. Based on the Roland® SDE-3000*.

708.name: Sweep
708.descriptionEn: Delay with a filter sweeping across the repeats.

709.name: Ping Pong
709.descriptionEn: Stereo delay that bounces repeats left to right.

801.name: Air
801.descriptionEn: Airy ambience with an open, natural tail.

802.name: Room
802.descriptionEn: Tight room reverb with a short decay.

803.name: Hall
803.descriptionEn: Concert-hall reverb with a long, smooth tail.

804.name: Church
804.descriptionEn: Cathedral reverb with a long, resonant decay.

807.name: Spring
807.descriptionEn: Amp-style spring reverb with a lively drip.

808.name: Light
808.descriptionEn: Bright, lush reverb with a shimmering top.

809.name: Ocean
809.descriptionEn: Huge, deep reverb with a cavernous decay.

810.name: Dream
810.descriptionEn: Modulated reverb with a lush, swirling tail.
